title: telanthera serpyllifolia
intro: Telanthera serpyllifolia, also known as the woolly geranium, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Telanthera serpyllifolia include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
